content.verdict: Mandapa is one of only six Ritz-Carlton Reserves worldwide — a 60-unit sanctuary on a sacred bend of the Ayung River just north of Ubud, styled as a traditional Balinese village with a stone pagoda 'mandapa' at its entrance. The combination of serious Ritz-Carlton service polish, palace-scale architecture, and a riverside setting with private-pool villas at most price levels makes it arguably the most comfortable luxury pick in Ubud. Rice-paddy views, not beach.
content.best_room: Book a One-Bedroom Pool Villa in the riverside cluster — the villas on the river side have direct Ayung gorge views from your private pool. The larger Two-Bedroom is only worth it if you're traveling as two couples or expecting family; the One-Bedroom is already enormous.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival Through the Pagoda
itinerary_7_nights.description: Transfer from Denpasar (90 min). Entry through the dramatic stone pagoda gate, welcome ceremony with flower petals. Villa tour with your Personal Butler. Dinner at Kubu, the candlelit jungle-bamboo-cocoon restaurant.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Ayung River & Rice Paddies
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning rafting on the Ayung (easy class II) or, for less intensity, a paddy walk with the cultural attaché. Afternoon by your private pool. Couples' massage at the spa, then dinner at Sawah Terrace overlooking rice fields.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Ubud Town & Art
itinerary_7_nights.description: Chauffeured day into central Ubud: Puri Saren palace, Ubud Art Market, Neka Museum, lunch at Room4Dessert. Return for sunset yoga on the lawn above the Ayung.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa Journey
itinerary_7_nights.description: Half-day couples' ritual at the spa — Journey of the Senses with four hands, flower bath, river-view pavilion. Lunch at the Pool Pavilion. Evening cooking class (hands-on Balinese).

itinerary_7_nights.title: Temples & Purification
itinerary_7_nights.description: Dawn visit to Tirta Empul for private melukat purification with the resort priest, followed by Gunung Kawi rock-cut shrines. Lunch at Moksa. Quiet evening on the villa pool deck.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Wellness Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning sunrise sound-healing session on the river platform. Private yoga. Ayurvedic-inspired tasting menu at Sawah. Evening in-villa massage and Champagne.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell Blessing
itinerary_7_nights.description: Personal pemangku performs a marriage blessing ceremony in your villa. Leisurely breakfast, transfer to the airport. Flight out from Denpasar.

caveats: Not on the beach — Ubud is 90 minutes from the south Bali shoreline. Pair with a beach property if you want both.
The resort is a serious climb through the property to the river villas — buggies run constantly but it's not pure walk-anywhere flat.
Suites (not villas) do not have private pools and are the weakest value on the property; always commit to a Pool Villa for a honeymoon.

faqs.a: Reserves are Marriott's top luxury tier, designed as singular destinations with fewer than 100 rooms and bespoke architecture. There are only six worldwide — Mandapa is the Asian flagship.

faqs.q: How does Mandapa compare to Four Seasons Sayan?
faqs.a: Four Seasons Sayan is iconic for the round 'lotus' pool and the mini-Angkor lobby, more architectural drama; Mandapa has better villas, better butler service, and more refined F&B. For honeymoons specifically, Mandapa wins for most couples.
Yes, families come, but the property skews older/couples, and the kids' club (Ritz Kids) is well-contained. Holiday seasons are liveliest.

faqs.q: Is the food among Bali's best?
faqs.a: Kubu (candlelit bamboo fine dining) is a genuine destination — 8-10 course tasting menus, one of the most atmospheric dining rooms in Asia. Sawah is excellent too.

faqs.q: Can we walk into Ubud town?
faqs.a: Technically yes (3 km), but it's steep and hot. The resort shuttles run regularly.
Yes — a resident cultural attaché runs daily activities: temple blessings, silver-smithing, batik, offerings-making.

content.email_template:
Subject: Honeymoon booking — One-Bedroom Pool Villa riverside, 7 nights, [DATES]

Dear Mandapa reservations,

We're planning our honeymoon and would like to book a One-Bedroom Pool Villa for 7 nights from [ARRIVAL] to [DEPARTURE]. Please prioritize a villa on the river side with Ayung views.

Could you please send:
- Best available rate including taxes and service
- Honeymoon amenities (welcome blessing, floral bath, dinner at Kubu, spa credit)
- Availability of private pemangku marriage blessing ceremony
- Airport transfer options
- Any renovation work scheduled during our dates

With thanks,
[Your names]
